{
  "claims": [
    "Suicide rates are highest among whites at 17.1 per 100,000 people, while Native American rates are 15.6 per 100,000.",
    "Suicide is the second leading cause of death for American Indian and Alaska Native children as well as adults ages 10 to 34.",
    "More than 40 percent of adults surveyed reported that the novel coronavirus created mental stress in their lives.",
    "11 percent of surveyed adults said they had seriously considered suicide in the last 30 days during the pandemic.",
    "Youth are particularly vulnerable, with suicide being the second leading cause of death among young people ages 15 to 24.",
    "One in six high school students reported seriously considering ending their lives, and more than one in 12 reported attempted suicides.",
    "Establishing state-level leadership is a recommended strategy for long-term reductions in death by suicide."
  ]
}
